code:
def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    window = params['window']
    threshold = params['threshold']
    ema_period = params['ema_period']
    aroon = ta.trend.aroon(df['high'], df['low'], window)
    aroon_up = aroon['aroon_up']
    aroon_down = aroon['aroon_down']
    ema = ta.trend.ema_indicator(df['close'], ema_period)
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index, dtype='int')
    long_cond = (aroon_up > threshold) & (aroon_down < (100 - threshold)) & (df['close'] > ema)
    short_cond = (aroon_down > threshold) & (aroon_up < (100 - threshold)) & (df['close'] < ema)
    signals[long_cond] = 1
    signals[short_cond] = -1
    return signals
rationale: EUR/JPY exhibits persistent trending behavior during risk-on/risk-off shifts; Aroon indicator identifies directional strength by measuring time since recent highs/lows, while the EMA filter ensures alignment with the long-term trend, reducing false signals in sideways markets.
